   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "2e3f55c0",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Non-prismatic Elements\n",
    "\n",
    "A *non-prismatic* member has a flexural rigidity $EI(x)$ that varies along its\n",
    "length &mdash; a haunch, a taper or a stepped section. In `PyCBA` such a member\n",
    "is an **element**, defined by a `SectionEI` object built from contiguous\n",
    "segments (`const`, `linear`, `pwl`, `poly`) and analysed exactly by flexibility\n",
    "integration.\n",
    "\n",
    "The companion tutorial, [Creep, Shrinkage, and Thermal Analysis](creep_shrinkage_thermal.ipynb), covers the\n",
    "*loading* side (creep/shrinkage/thermal curvatures), including a combined\n",
    "example that applies an imposed curvature to the non-prismatic beam built here.\n",
    "The underlying method is in the [Theoretical Basis](../theory.ipynb); the source\n",
    "texts are on the [References](../references.md) page."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "42eab4fe",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.448652Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.448592Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.790277Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.789891Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import pycba as cba\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from pycba import SectionEI"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "a32024d6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Example 1 - Building a variable-EI section\n",
    "\n",
    "A non-prismatic member is described by a `SectionEI` built from contiguous\n",
    "**segments** (`const`, `linear`, `pwl`, `poly`) giving $EI(x)$ in the span-local\n",
    "coordinate. Here the member is stiff (haunched) at both supports and slender at\n",
    "midspan. `SectionEI.plot()` draws $EI(x)$ so you can check the section you built\n",
    "&mdash; kinks show as slope changes and the segment joins are flagged."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "4fd7e45e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.791699Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.791542Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.858820Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.858567Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "data": {
      "text/plain": "<Figure size 1000x350 with 1 Axes>",
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {}
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Stiff (haunched) at both supports, slender at midspan: two linear haunches\n",
    "# and a constant flat soffit.  SectionEI.plot() is an input-verification of EI(x).\n",
    "sec = SectionEI(\n",
    "    [\n",
    "        (\"linear\", [0.0, 3.0], [3.0e5, 1.2e5]),   # haunch down from the left support\n",
    "        (\"const\",  [3.0, 9.0], 1.2e5),            # slender flat soffit\n",
    "        (\"linear\", [9.0, 12.0], [1.2e5, 3.0e5]),  # haunch up to the right support\n",
    "    ]\n",
    ")\n",
    "fig, ax = sec.plot(figsize=(10, 3.5))\n",
    "fig.tight_layout()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "bbeae874",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Example 2 - Two-span beam with a haunched support\n",
    "\n",
    "Haunching a continuous beam over its interior support stiffens the \"pier\" and\n",
    "**attracts hogging moment to it**. Each span deepens parabolically toward the\n",
    "interior support (so $EI$ rises there); we compare the pier moment with the\n",
    "prismatic beam, whose value is the textbook $-wL^2/8$."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "12fecf37",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.859741Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.859667Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.867393Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.867175Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "stream",
     "name": "stdout",
     "text": "Prismatic pier moment =   -375.0 kNm  (closed form -wL^2/8 = -375.0)\nHaunched  pier moment =   -501.0 kNm  (+34% -- haunch draws hogging to the pier)\n"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Symmetric two-span beam; section depth deepens parabolically to the interior\n",
    "# support, so EI = E*b*d(x)^3/12 rises toward the pier.\n",
    "E, b = 30.0e6, 1.0                 # E = 30 GPa (kPa), unit width\n",
    "Lsp, DC, Dh, Lh, w = 10.0, 0.6, 1.2, 3.0, 30.0   # span, mid depth, pier depth, haunch len, UDL\n",
    "EI_const = E * b * DC**3 / 12.0    # prismatic (mid-depth) rigidity\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def haunch_poly(d_end, d_pier, x_end, x_pier):\n",
    "    \"\"\"Parabolic depth: flat (vertex) at the shallow end (d_end at x_end),\n",
    "    deepening to d_pier at the support (x_pier).  Returns an EI(x) callable.\"\"\"\n",
    "    def f(x):\n",
    "        s = (np.asarray(x, float) - x_end) / (x_pier - x_end)\n",
    "        return E * b * (d_end + (d_pier - d_end) * s**2) ** 3 / 12.0\n",
    "    return f\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "# span 1: prismatic at the end support, haunch deepening to the pier (right end)\n",
    "sec1 = SectionEI(\n",
    "    [\n",
    "        (\"const\", [0.0, Lsp - Lh], EI_const),\n",
    "        (\"poly\",  [Lsp - Lh, Lsp], haunch_poly(DC, Dh, Lsp - Lh, Lsp), 6),\n",
    "    ]\n",
    ")\n",
    "# span 2: the mirror image of span 1 -- haunch at the pier (left end), prismatic\n",
    "# to the right.  Its parabola vertex is at the shallow (DC) end x = Lh, so the\n",
    "# EI profile is symmetric about the pier.\n",
    "sec2 = SectionEI(\n",
    "    [\n",
    "        (\"poly\",  [0.0, Lh], haunch_poly(DC, Dh, Lh, 0.0), 6),\n",
    "        (\"const\", [Lh, Lsp], EI_const),\n",
    "    ]\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "ba_h = cba.BeamAnalysis([Lsp, Lsp], [sec1, sec2], [-1, 0, -1, 0, -1, 0])\n",
    "ba_h.add_udl(1, w)\n",
    "ba_h.add_udl(2, w)\n",
    "ba_h.analyze(npts=300)\n",
    "M_pier_h = ba_h.beam_results.results.M.min()\n",
    "\n",
    "ba_p = cba.BeamAnalysis([Lsp, Lsp], [EI_const, EI_const], [-1, 0, -1, 0, -1, 0])\n",
    "ba_p.add_udl(1, w)\n",
    "ba_p.add_udl(2, w)\n",
    "ba_p.analyze(npts=300)\n",
    "M_pier_p = ba_p.beam_results.results.M.min()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Prismatic pier moment = {M_pier_p:8.1f} kNm  (closed form -wL^2/8 = {-w*Lsp**2/8:.1f})\")\n",
    "print(f\"Haunched  pier moment = {M_pier_h:8.1f} kNm  \"\n",
    "      f\"({100*(abs(M_pier_h)-abs(M_pier_p))/abs(M_pier_p):+.0f}% -- haunch draws hogging to the pier)\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "06abc2a2f8b6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": "The two-span beam and its loading (the schematic shows the supports and loads; the varying `EI` is not depicted):"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "030518791e12",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-22T08:04:41.235900Z",
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-22T08:04:41.236013Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-22T08:04:41.352079Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-22T08:04:41.351734Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "ba_h.plot_beam();"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "data": {
      "text/plain": "<Figure size 1000x320 with 1 Axes>",
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {}
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "be547ef7",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.868288Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-06-11T11:08:34.868220Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-06-11T11:08:35.018718Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-06-11T11:08:35.018453Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "data": {
      "text/plain": "<Figure size 1000x600 with 2 Axes>",
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {}
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# EI(x) elevation and the resulting BMD (haunched vs prismatic).\n",
    "xx = np.linspace(0.0, Lsp, 200)\n",
    "EI_prof = np.concatenate([sec1(xx), sec2(xx)]) / 1e6          # MNm^2\n",
    "x_prof = np.concatenate([xx, Lsp + xx])\n",
    "\n",
    "fig, axs = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(10, 6), sharex=True)\n",
    "axs[0].plot(x_prof, EI_prof, \"b\", lw=2, label=\"haunched $EI(x)$\")\n",
    "axs[0].axhline(EI_const / 1e6, color=\"0.5\", ls=\"--\", lw=1.5, label=\"prismatic $EI$\")\n",
    "axs[0].axvline(Lsp, color=\"k\", lw=0.8)\n",
    "axs[0].set_ylabel(\"$EI$  (MNm$^2$)\")\n",
    "axs[0].set_title(\"Two-span beam: parabolic haunch at the interior support\")\n",
    "axs[0].grid(True)\n",
    "axs[0].legend(loc=\"upper left\")\n",
    "\n",
    "axs[1].axhline(0, color=\"k\", lw=1.0)\n",
    "axs[1].plot(ba_p.beam_results.results.x, ba_p.beam_results.results.M, \"0.5\", ls=\"--\",\n",
    "            label=f\"prismatic (pier {M_pier_p:.0f} kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].plot(ba_h.beam_results.results.x, ba_h.beam_results.results.M, \"r\",\n",
    "            label=f\"haunched (pier {M_pier_h:.0f} kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].invert_yaxis()\n",
    "axs[1].set_ylabel(\"Bending moment (kNm)\")\n",
    "axs[1].set_xlabel(\"Distance along beam (m)\")\n",
    "axs[1].grid(True)\n",
    "axs[1].legend(loc=\"upper left\")\n",
    "fig.tight_layout()"
   ]
  }
 ],
